data.description: EOA-based Python library + CLI for testing x402 payments. Full HTTP 402 → EIP-712 sign → X-PAYMENT header flow. No CDP wallet required. - rplryan/x402-payment-harness

emerging standard for HTTP-native micropayments on Base — enabling AI agents, APIs, and services to charge per-request without subscriptions or API key billing.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe problem:\u003c/strong\u003e The reference x402 implementation is built around Coinbase Developer Platform (CDP) managed wallets, which abstract away the signing logic — but require account creation, KYC-adjacent onboarding, and vendor lock-in. This is a real friction point for:\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cul dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🔧 \u003cstrong\u003eServer builders\u003c/strong\u003e who want to test their x402 endpoint as a client would\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🤖 \u003cstrong\u003eAgent developers\u003c/strong\u003e integrating x402 payments into autonomous workflows\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🧪 \u003cstrong\u003eProtocol researchers\u003c/strong\u003e exploring x402 behavior across different servers\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003e🏃 \u003cstrong\u003eTeams running CI/CD\u003c/strong\u003e who need deterministic, reproducible payment tests\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ul\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThis library removes that barrier entirely.\u003c/strong\u003e Any standard Ethereum EOA private key works — MetaMask export, hardware wallet, generated test key. No CDP account, no onboarding, no dependency on Coinbase infrastructure.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eThis is the \u003cstrong\u003eonly Python x402 client library with native EIP-712 \u003ccode\u003eTransferWithAuthorization\u003c/code\u003e signing\u003c/strong\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eInstallation\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-installation\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Installation\" href=\"#installation\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto\" dir=\"auto\" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content=\"pip install x402-payment-harness\"\u003e\u003cpre\u003epip install x402-payment-harness\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003eRequires Python 3.8+. /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐\n│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  x402 Server     │\n│  (you)   │◄────────────────────────── │                  │\n└──────────┘   402 + X-PAYMENT-REQUIRED  └──────────────────┘\n      │         {amount, payTo, chainId,                ▲\n      │          EIP-712 domain separator}              │\n      │                                                 │\n      ▼ Sign TransferWithAuthorization                  │\n  EOA Private Key                                       │\n  eth_account.sign_typed_data()                         │\n      │                                                 │\n      ▼                                                 │\n┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐\n│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  Verify EIP-712  │\n│  (you)   │   + X-PAYMENT: \u0026lt;base64\u0026gt;   ►│  signature ✓     │\n└──────────┘◄────────────────────────── │  Return 200 OK   │\n              200 OK + response body    └──────────────────┘\"\u003e\u003cpre class=\"notranslate\"\u003e\u003ccode\u003e┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐\n│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  x402 Server     │\n│  (you)   │◄────────────────────────── │                  │\n└──────────┘   402 + X-PAYMENT-REQUIRED  └──────────────────┘\n      │         {amount, payTo, chainId,                ▲\n      │          EIP-712 domain separator}              │\n      │                                                 │\n      ▼ Sign TransferWithAuthorization                  │\n  EOA Private Key                                       │\n  eth_account.sign_typed_data()                         │\n      │                                                 │\n      ▼                                                 │\n┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐\n│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  Verify EIP-712  │\n│  (you)   │   + X-PAYMENT: \u0026lt;base64\u0026gt;   ►│  signature ✓     │\n└──────────┘◄────────────────────────── │  Return 200 OK   │\n              200 OK + response body    └──────────────────┘\n\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/pre\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSteps executed automatically:\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003col dir=\"auto\"\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eInitial HTTP request to target endpoint\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eReceive \u003ccode\u003e402 Payment Required\u003c/code\u003e with \u003ccode\u003eX-PAYMENT-REQUIRED\u003c/code\u003e header\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eParse EIP-712 domain separator and \u003ccode\u003eTransferWithAuthorization\u003c/code\u003e message struct\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eSign the struct using your EOA private key via \u003ccode\u003eeth_account\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eBase64-encode the signed payload and attach as \u003ccode\u003eX-PAYMENT\u003c/code\u003e header\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003cli\u003eRetry the request — server verifies signature and responds \u003ccode\u003e200 OK\u003c/code\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\n\u003c/ol\u003e\n\u003cblockquote\u003e\n\u003cp dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eOn settlement:\u003c/strong\u003e This harness implements the complete x402 \u003cstrong\u003eclient-side\u003c/strong\u003e protocol — producing valid, spec-compliant \u003ccode\u003eTransferWithAuthorization\u003c/code\u003e EIP-712 signatures. Server-side on-chain USDC settlement via \u003ccode\u003ereceiveWithAuthorization\u003c/code\u003e is the facilitator's responsibility. The harness is the correct tool for testing and validating the client flow against any x402-compliant server.\u003c/p\u003e\n\u003c/blockquote\u003e\n\u003chr\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch2 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003eUse Cases\u003c/h2\u003e\u003ca id=\"user-content-use-cases\" class=\"anchor\" aria-label=\"Permalink: Use Cases\" href=\"#use-cases\"\u003e\u003csvg data-component=\"Octicon\" class=\"octicon octicon-link\" viewBox=\"0 0 16 16\" version=\"1.1\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" aria-hidden=\"true\"\u003e\u003cpath d=\"m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z\"\u003e\u003c/path\u003e\u003c/svg\u003e\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\n\u003cdiv class=\"markdown-heading\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e\u003ch3 tabindex=\"-1\" class=\"heading-element\" dir=\"auto\"\u003e🔨 Server Development \u0026amp; <p dir="auto"><strong>The missing developer tool for x402.</strong> Test any x402-protected endpoint from your terminal or Python code — no Coinbase Developer Platform wallet required. Just a standard Ethereum private key.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">x402_harness</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">X402Client</span>

<span class="pl-s1">client</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">X402Client</span>(<span class="pl-s1">private_key</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">"0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY"</span>)
<span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span>.<span class="pl-c1">get</span>(<span class="pl-s">"https://api.example.com/premium-data"</span>)
<span class="pl-en">print</span>(<span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">json</span>())</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">The client handles the full <code>HTTP 402 → EIP-712 sign → X-PAYMENT header → 200 OK</code> flow automatically.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Why This Exists</h2><a id="user-content-why-this-exists" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Why This Exists" href="#why-this-exists"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">The <a href="https://x402.org" rel="nofollow">x402 protocol</a> is the emerging standard for HTTP-native micropayments on Base — enabling AI agents, APIs, and services to charge per-request without subscriptions or API key billing.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>The problem:</strong> The reference x402 implementation is built around Coinbase Developer Platform (CDP) managed wallets, which abstract away the signing logic — but require account creation, KYC-adjacent onboarding, and vendor lock-in. This is a real friction point for:</p>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>🔧 <strong>Server builders</strong> who want to test their x402 endpoint as a client would</li>
<li>🤖 <strong>Agent developers</strong> integrating x402 payments into autonomous workflows</li>
<li>🧪 <strong>Protocol researchers</strong> exploring x402 behavior across different servers</li>
<li>🏃 <strong>Teams running CI/CD</strong> who need deterministic, reproducible payment tests</li>
</ul>
<p dir="auto"><strong>This library removes that barrier entirely.</strong> Any standard Ethereum EOA private key works — MetaMask export, hardware wallet, generated test key. No CDP account, no onboarding, no dependency on Coinbase infrastructure.</p>
<p dir="auto">This is the <strong>only Python x402 client library with native EIP-712 <code>TransferWithAuthorization</code> signing</strong>.</p>
<hr>

<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Pay and fetch in one command</span>
x402-pay --url https://api.example.com/premium-data --key 0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Inspect every step of the payment flow</span>
x402-pay --url https://api.example.com/premium-data --key 0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY --verbose

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> POST request with JSON body</span>
x402-pay --url https://api.example.com/generate --key 0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY \
  --method POST --data <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">'</span>{"prompt": "Hello, world"}<span class="pl-pds">'</span></span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">x402_harness</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">X402Client</span>

<span class="pl-c"># Initialize with any standard EOA private key</span>
<span class="pl-s1">client</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">X402Client</span>(
    <span class="pl-s1">private_key</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">"0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY"</span>,
    <span class="pl-s1">network</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s">"base-mainnet"</span>       <span class="pl-c"># default; also supports "base-sepolia"</span>
)

<span class="pl-c"># GET request — handles full 402 → sign → retry flow automatically</span>
<span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span>.<span class="pl-c1">get</span>(<span class="pl-s">"https://api.example.com/premium-data"</span>)

<span class="pl-k">if</span> <span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">status_code</span> <span class="pl-c1">==</span> <span class="pl-c1">200</span>:
    <span class="pl-en">print</span>(<span class="pl-s">"Payment accepted:"</span>, <span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">json</span>())

<span class="pl-c"># POST with body</span>
<span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span>.<span class="pl-c1">post</span>(
    <span class="pl-s">"https://api.example.com/generate"</span>,
    <span class="pl-s1">json</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span>{<span class="pl-s">"prompt"</span>: <span class="pl-s">"Analyze this market data"</span>}
)

<span class="pl-c"># Access payment details from the last transaction</span>
<span class="pl-en">print</span>(<span class="pl-s1">client</span>.<span class="pl-c1">last_payment</span>)  <span class="pl-c"># {amount, recipient, signature, nonce, ...}</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="from x402_harness import X402Client

# Initialize with any standard EOA private key
client = X402Client(
    private_key="0xYOUR_PRIVATE_KEY",
    network="base-mainnet"       # default; also supports "base-sepolia"
)

# GET request — handles full 402 → sign → retry flow automatically
response = client.get("https://api.example.com/premium-data")

if response.status_code == 200:
    print("Payment accepted:", response.json())

# POST with body
response = client.post(
    "https://api.example.com/generate",
    json={"prompt": "Analyze this market data"}
)

# Access payment details from the last transaction
print(client.last_payment)  # {amount, recipient, signature, nonce, ...}" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">How It Works: The x402 Protocol Flow</h2><a id="user-content-how-it-works-the-x402-protocol-flow" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: How It Works: The x402 Protocol Flow" href="#how-it-works-the-x402-protocol-flow"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">When you call <code>client.get(url)</code>, the harness executes the complete x402 client protocol:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐
│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  x402 Server     │
│  (you)   │◄────────────────────────── │                  │
└──────────┘   402 + X-PAYMENT-REQUIRED  └──────────────────┘
      │         {amount, payTo, chainId,                ▲
      │          EIP-712 domain separator}              │
      │                                                 │
      ▼ Sign TransferWithAuthorization                  │
  EOA Private Key                                       │
  eth_account.sign_typed_data()                         │
      │                                                 │
      ▼                                                 │
┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐
│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  Verify EIP-712  │
│  (you)   │   + X-PAYMENT: <base64>   ►│  signature ✓     │
└──────────┘◄────────────────────────── │  Return 200 OK   │
              200 OK + response body    └──────────────────┘
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐
│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  x402 Server     │
│  (you)   │◄────────────────────────── │                  │
└──────────┘   402 + X-PAYMENT-REQUIRED  └──────────────────┘
      │         {amount, payTo, chainId,                ▲
      │          EIP-712 domain separator}              │
      │                                                 │
      ▼ Sign TransferWithAuthorization                  │
  EOA Private Key                                       │
  eth_account.sign_typed_data()                         │
      │                                                 │
      ▼                                                 │
┌──────────┐    GET /premium-data       ┌──────────────────┐
│  Client  │ ──────────────────────────►│  Verify EIP-712  │
│  (you)   │   + X-PAYMENT: <base64>   ►│  signature ✓     │
└──────────┘◄────────────────────────── │  Return 200 OK   │
              200 OK + response body    └──────────────────┘" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto"><strong>Steps executed automatically:</strong></p>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Initial HTTP request to target endpoint</li>
<li>Receive <code>402 Payment Required</code> with <code>X-PAYMENT-REQUIRED</code> header</li>
<li>Parse EIP-712 domain separator and <code>TransferWithAuthorization</code> message struct</li>
<li>Sign the struct using your EOA private key via <code>eth_account</code></li>
<li>Base64-encode the signed payload and attach as <code>X-PAYMENT</code> header</li>
<li>Retry the request — server verifies signature and responds <code>200 OK</code></li>
</ol>
<blockquote>
<p dir="auto"><strong>On settlement:</strong> This harness implements the complete x402 <strong>client-side</strong> protocol — producing valid, spec-compliant <code>TransferWithAuthorization</code> EIP-712 signatures. Server-side on-chain USDC settlement via <code>receiveWithAuthorization</code> is the facilitator's responsibility. The harness is the correct tool for testing and validating the client flow against any x402-compliant server.</p>
</blockquote>

<p dir="auto">Building an x402-protected API? Use this harness as your client to test every payment edge case — invalid signatures, expired nonces, wrong amounts — without building a custom test client.</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-s1">pytest</span>
<span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">x402_harness</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">X402Client</span>

<span class="pl-k">def</span> <span class="pl-en">test_my_api_accepts_valid_payment</span>():
    <span class="pl-s1">client</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">X402Client</span>(<span class="pl-s1">private_key</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-c1">TEST_KEY</span>)
    <span class="pl-s1">response</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span>.<span class="pl-c1">get</span>(<span class="pl-s">"http://localhost:8000/protected"</span>)
    <span class="pl-k">assert</span> <span class="pl-s1">response</span>.<span class="pl-c1">status_code</span> <span class="pl-c1">==</span> <span class="pl-c1">200</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤖 AI Agent Integration</h3><a id="user-content--ai-agent-integration" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤖 AI Agent Integration" href="#-ai-agent-integration"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Autonomous agents can make x402 payments without managed wallet infrastructure:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-python notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-k">from</span> <span class="pl-s1">x402_harness</span> <span class="pl-k">import</span> <span class="pl-v">X402Client</span>

<span class="pl-c"># Agent pays for data, processes result, continues workflow</span>
<span class="pl-s1">client</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-en">X402Client</span>(<span class="pl-s1">private_key</span><span class="pl-c1">=</span><span class="pl-s1">os</span>.<span class="pl-c1">environ</span>[<span class="pl-s">"AGENT_WALLET_KEY"</span>])
<span class="pl-s1">market_data</span> <span class="pl-c1">=</span> <span class="pl-s1">client</span>.<span class="pl-c1">get</span>(<span class="pl-s">"https://x402-api.example.com/prices"</span>).<span class="pl-c1">json</span>()
<span class="pl-s1">agent</span>.<span class="pl-c1">process</span>(<span class="pl-s1">market_data</span>)</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Features</h2><a id="user-content-features" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Features" href="#features"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Feature</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Full protocol flow</strong></td>
<td>HTTP 402 challenge → EIP-712 sign → <code>X-PAYMENT</code> header, end-to-end</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>EOA support</strong></td>
<td>Works with any standard Ethereum private key — no CDP wallet required</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>ERC-3009 signing</strong></td>
<td>Native <code>TransferWithAuthorization</code> EIP-712 typed data signing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>CLI tool</strong></td>
<td><code>x402-pay --url <endpoint></code> for fast terminal testing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Python library</strong></td>
<td><code>X402Client</code> with <code>get()</code> and <code>post()</code> methods</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Base mainnet proven</strong></td>
<td>Confirmed working against live Base USDC x402 endpoints</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Test suite</strong></td>
<td>4 passing automated tests covering core protocol flows</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Zero vendor lock-in</strong></td>
<td>Pure open source, no CDP dependency, no API keys needed</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Testing</h2><a id="user-content-testing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Testing" href="#testing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<p dir="auto">All 4 tests pass without any API keys or live network connections — the test suite uses fixtures to mock the 402 challenge/response cycle. This makes it suitable for CI/CD without wallet credentials.</p>
<hr>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Part of the x402 Infrastructure Suite</h2><a id="user-content-part-of-the-x402-infrastructure-suite" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Part of the x402 Infrastructure Suite" href="#part-of-the-x402-infrastructure-suite"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">This library is part of a suite of open-source tools built to make x402 practical:</p>
<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Tool</th>
<th>What It Does</th>
<th>Status</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>x402 Payment Harness</strong></td>
<td>EOA-based client library and CLI for testing x402</td>
<td><strong>This repo</strong></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong><a href="https://github.com/rplryan/x402-discovery-api">x402 Discovery API</a></strong></td>
<td>Searchable registry of 251+ live x402-enabled services with health signals</td>
<td><a href="https://x402-discovery-api.onrender.com" rel="nofollow">Live</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong><a href="https://github.com/rplryan/x402-discovery-mcp">x402 Discovery MCP</a></strong></td>
<td>MCP server exposing Discovery API to Claude, Cursor, Windsurf</td>
<td><a href="https://registry.modelcontextprotocol.io" rel="nofollow">Published</a></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong><a href="https://github.com/rplryan/x402-routenet">x402 RouteNet</a></strong></td>
<td>Intelligent routing across x402 services with health-aware fallback</td>
<td><a href="https://x402-routenet.onrender.com" rel="nofollow">Live</a></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>
<p dir="auto">Together these tools cover the three layers every developer needs: <strong>discover</strong> x402 services, <strong>route</strong> to the best one, and <strong>test</strong> the payment flow end-to-end.</p>
